description: The 4StoreyBuilding building model is open in eQUEST. This is a real multi-storey commercial building with exterior walls made of Stucco, Insulation Board, and Gypsum Board layers. Change the solar absorptance (ABSORPTANCE) of the 'EWall Construction' to 0.5 to represent switching the exterior wall surface to a lighter finish that reflects more solar radiation and reduces solar heat gain through the building envelope. Save the project.
